scripts.fhevm:install: git submodule update --init --recursive && cd contracts/lib/forge-fhevm && GIT_LFS_SKIP_SMUDGE=1 forge soldeer install
scripts.contracts:install: cd contracts && GIT_LFS_SKIP_SMUDGE=1 forge soldeer install && forge build
scripts.local:app: cd contracts && rm -rf broadcast && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast --slow --skip-simulation --sender 0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6F4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266 --private-key 0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80
scripts.local:deploy: pnpm local:host && pnpm local:app && node scripts/write-env.mjs
